profile_backed_target.source: restored-source profile after pass162/pass163 plus fresh fixed-worker baseline

lever.summary: Pack a bounded IC slab of MR row tiles for each KC block instead of packing the whole thread row chunk

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Each output element still accumulates pc blocks in ascending pc order and l=0..kc in ascending order inside each pc block; row-slab tiling only changes the order independent row tiles are visited.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparisons or tie-breaking behavior in matmul_2d.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No FMA, mixed precision, horizontal reduction, or reassociation per output element.

validation.test_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-i7atq-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
validation.test_result: candidate passed: 9 passed, 0 failed, 1 ignored, 1165 filtered out

benchmark.baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-i7atq-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 3 --measurement-time 20
benchmark.after_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-i7atq-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 3 --measurement-time 20

decision.reason: The row-slab candidate regressed the same-worker target from 631.25 ms median to 827.30 ms median. Source was restored.
decision.next_primitive: Stop row-slab A-pack tiling. The next GEMM swing should change the larger macro-schedule, such as a single-sweep packed full-k path gate or a behavior-contract bead for FP-tolerant recursive/Strassen-style algorithms.
